title: Quest Electric Pancake Maker & Crepe Maker | Extra Large Cooking Surface | Non Stick, Easy Clean Up | Includes Utensils | Perfect for Pancakes, Crepes, Omelettes, Chapati, Roti
features: ELECTRIC PANCAKE MAKER – This electric pancake maker is the perfect kitchen appliance to provide you with delicious home-made pancakes and crepes in just a matter of minutes.

NON-STICK HOT PLATE – This pancake and crepe maker features a 12” non-stick hot plate that will cook your sweet treats perfectly, and not have them stick to the base during the cooking process. Once you’ve made your pancakes the surface is super easy to wipe clean once cooled down.

RAISED EDGES – The surround of the electric pancake maker hot plate is slightly raised to keep your mixture on the hot plate and reduce spillage/waste. The hot plate reaches temperatures of up to 220°C, and has an adjustable temperature gauge so you can cook the perfect pancakes your way.

VERSATILE APPLIANCE – Not only does this hot plate cook delicious pancakes and crepes, but it is also suitable to make omelettes, chapattis, & rotas, amongst many others. In order to create the perfect pancake the set comes complete with a wooden spreader and spatula.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Perfect for Pancake Tuesday Quest Electric Pancake Maker Make delicious pancakes, crepes, omelettes and more with this versatile Pancake Maker from Quest. Its cooking plate spans a 12" diameter for plenty of cooking space, and is also non-stick, making cleaning simple. A wooden spatula and batter spreader are also included to help you precisely make the perfect pancakes. Previous page Easy Operation The pancake maker features an adjustable temperature gauge up to 220°C for precise cooking. Non-Stick Plate The non-stick cooking plate prevents your food from getting stuck, and also makes cleaning simpler. Not Just Pancakes The 12 inch flat surface is also ideal for making crepes, flatbreads, rotis, omelettes, and more. Accessories Included To help you make the perfect pancakes, a wooden spatula and spreader are also included. Raised Edges The edge of the pancake maker is slightly raised to ensure none of the mixture spills over the side.
